calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Scott Kruger and Mark Moreno appearing for Appellant/Defendant 1860 Washington Street Condominium Asociation.
Aaron McCoy and Alyssa McCoy, Respondents/Plaintiffs appearing on their own behalf.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Aalyssa McCoy testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit B-Letter dated Nov-12-06
Exhibit C-Innovative Windows, Inc. invoice
Exhibit D-Letter dated April 2007
Exhibit D1-Letter dated Nov-06-06
Exhibit E-Leter to Sue Graumlich and Joel Tardiff
Exhibit F-Email dated Sep-12-11 (4 pages)
Exhibit G-Email dated Dec-03-12
Exhibit H-Email dated Oct-05-13 (6 pages)
Exhibit I-Email dated Oct-10-13 (2 pages)
Exhibit J-Special Assessment Reduction Request

Mark Moreno and Scott Kruger testify on behalf 1860 Washington Street Condominium Asociation.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A-Appellant Summary

At the conclustion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Theresa Moore, Clerk: J. Murphy, Not Reported. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Judgment Entered
